title: eriogonum niveum
intro: Eriogonum niveum, also known as the White Sagebrush Buckwheat, is a perennial flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Eriogonum niveum include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Eriogonum niveum can be found in tea, tincture, and topical form, and are often used to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues.
